'''chatuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:izhitsa|izhitsa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:izhitsa|izhitsa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chatuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chætiyith|chætiyith]] || [[word:chætiyij|chætiyij]] || [[word:chætiyish|chætiyish]] || [[word:chætiyi|chætiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chatutuyuth|chatutuyuth]] || [[word:chatutuyuj|chatutuyuj]] || [[word:chatutuyush|chatutuyush]] || [[word:chatutuyu|chatutuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chatuyuth|chatuyuth]] || [[word:chatuyuj|chatuyuj]] || [[word:chatuyush|chatuyush]] || [[word:chatuyu|chatuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chatufyuth|chatufyuth]] || [[word:chatufyuj|chatufyuj]] || [[word:chatufyush|chatufyush]] || [[word:chatufyuf|chatufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chatuyuthu|chatuyuthu]] || [[word:chatuyuju|chatuyuju]] || [[word:chatuyushu|chatuyushu]] || [[word:chatuyuku|chatuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chatuyuth|chatuyuth]] || [[word:chatuyuj|chatuyuj]] || [[word:chatuyush|chatuyush]] || [[word:chatuyu|chatuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chatuyuthul|chatuyuthul]] || [[word:chatuyujul|chatuyujul]] || [[word:chatuyushul|chatuyushul]] || [[word:chatuyukul|chatuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chatuyuthuthu|chatuyuthuthu]] || [[word:chatuyujuju|chatuyujuju]] || [[word:chatuyushushu|chatuyushushu]] || [[word:chatuyuku|chatuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chatuyuthun|chatuyuthun]] || [[word:chatuyujun|chatuyujun]] || [[word:chatuyushun|chatuyushun]] || [[word:chatuyukun|chatuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chatuyuthuoro|chatuyuthuoro]] || [[word:chatuyujuoro|chatuyujuoro]] || [[word:chatuyushuoro|chatuyushuoro]] || [[word:chatuyukuoro|chatuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
